should_trigger: city plan checker uploaded a plan binder for review
review this ADU plan binder against state and city compliance
generate a draft corrections letter for this submittal
city-side review — produce findings with confidence flags
screen this plan submittal for completeness before human review
should_not_trigger: the contractor uploaded a corrections letter and the plan binder
what does state law say about parking
what's the lot coverage rule for an ADU in Roxbury
fix a bug in the verifier
rationale: Must activate on city-side review (plan binder + city name input). Must NOT activate on contractor-side flows (adu-corrections-flow / adu-corrections-complete) — same domain knowledge, opposite direction.
